message:
🐛 Fix demo badge not showing for non-Kagenti cards (#675)

* 🐛 Fix Clusters dashboard flicker in demo mode

On console.kubestellar.io (forced demo mode), fullFetchClusters() was:
1. Setting isLoading: true
2. Trying to fetch from agent (which fails on Netlify)
3. Then falling back to demo data

This caused visible flicker. Now we:
1. Initialize clusterCache with isLoading: false when isDemoModeForced
2. Check isDemoModeForced at start of fullFetchClusters and skip fetching
3. Populate demo data synchronously without loading states

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix demo badge not showing for non-Kagenti cards

The useCardLoadingState hook was defaulting isDemoData to false,
causing all cards using this hook to accidentally opt-out of the
demo indicator badge and yellow border.

Changed the default from false to undefined so cards don't opt-out
unless they explicitly set isDemoData: false.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
